parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id, first_name: $json.first_name, last_name: $json.last_name, phone: $json.phone || null, email: $json.email || null, source: $json.source, vehicle_interest: $json.vehicle_interest || null, stage: 'new', intent_score: 'cold', sequence_step: 0, demo_mode: $json.demo_mode, opted_out: false, salesperson_alerted: false, sms_count: 0, assigned_to: $json.assigned_to || null }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', lead_id: Array.isArray($('Insert Lead to Supabase').first().json) ? $('Insert Lead to Supabase').first().json[0].id : $('Insert Lead to Supabase').first().json.id }) }}
